title: Complete execution plan phase 5 (allocator + GC hooks + interop builtins)
body:
Closed **execution plan Phase 5**: runtime allocator integration, GC scaffolding wired to gc-arena, interop builtins, and diagnostic improvements around runtime failures.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`9bbf2f4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/9bbf2f4)
- **Subject:** Mark Phase 5 complete with runtime allocator, GC scaffolding, interop builtins, and diagnostic improvements
- **Completed:** 2026-02-25

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `codegen-runtime`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-execution-jit-gc`

## Relation
Phase 5 is the milestone where Pecan’s JIT path became **demo-complete** for allocator/GC—not production-complete, but enough to validate lowering → runtime → collection hooks. Execution/GC deliverable `v00-execution-jit-gc` reached its closed date alongside concurrency research notes.

source.subject: Mark Phase 5 complete with runtime allocator, GC scaffolding, interop builtins, and diagnostic improvements
